upasargachandrika.example_text: 'upotTAyADvaryuSca yajamAnaScASvasya dakziRe karRe AjapataH' (Sa0 brA0 134215) Ajapata Izajjalpata ityarTaH
'tasyA upotTAya karRamAjapet' (tE0 saM0 716) Ajapet upAMSu kaTayet AN pUrvo japiriha sakarmakaH prayuktaH karRametya japedityarTaH
'kzetrasTezu ca sasyezu SatrorupajapennarAn' (BA0 SAM0 6938) upajaped Bedayet
'tezu tezu cAkftyezu prAsaran paropajApAH' (daSaku0) upajApaH svapakzaM prati pracCannaM preraRam
